CustomField.description: When checked, ALL trigger actions for this object are completely skipped. This is an object-level kill switch that overrides individual action settings. Unlike permission-based bypasses, this applies unconditionally to all users.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to disable ALL trigger actions for this object. Use as a kill switch during data migrations or troubleshooting. Uncheck to re-enable.
CustomField.label: Bypass Execution
